info.name: Pocket Network Shannon RPC API
info.description:
The Pocket Network Shannon chain is a Cosmos SDK + CometBFT chain (poktroll). Every full node exposes the standard Cosmos REST and CometBFT RPC surfaces. Public endpoints are operated by Grove and Pocket Network Foundation. This profile documents the read-only endpoints most often consumed by integrators — block, transaction, validator, supply, and on-chain module queries (application, supplier, gateway, service, session, proof, tokenomics). Write operations are signed transactions broadcast via the same REST surface or the poktrolld CLI; they share the `/cosmos/tx/v1beta1/txs` endpoint.


Contact Support:
 Name: Pocket Network Foundation

request.description: Return the most recently committed CometBFT block.
Return the Shannon block at a specific height.
Return a Shannon transaction by its hash.
Broadcast a signed Shannon transaction. The request body is a TxRaw-encoded transaction with broadcast mode (sync, async, block).

response.name: Broadcast result with tx hash and code.

request.description: Return all coin balances for a Shannon address (upokt and IBC tokens).
Return the total Shannon supply for every denom (upokt and IBC).
List Cosmos staking validators for the Shannon chain.
Return a single Application by Shannon address.
List every Application module entry. Applications stake POKT to consume relays via gateways for one or more services.
Return a single Supplier by Shannon operator address.
List every Supplier module entry. Suppliers stake POKT and run a RelayMiner to serve relays for the services they support.
List every Gateway module entry. Gateways stake POKT and are authorized by Applications to sign relays on their behalf.
List every service registered on Shannon. A service represents an external data source (e.g. eth, solana, base, arbitrum) the network can serve relays for. Each service has compute-unit pricing.
Return the active session for a given application/service pair at a given block height. Sessions group applications and suppliers for the duration of a session window.
Return the parameters of the on-chain Proof module (claim and proof windows, minimum relay difficulty, target submission probability).
Return the Shannon tokenomics parameters — mint ratio, allocations to DAO/proposer/source-owner/supplier, and global inflation/deflation settings (post-PIP-41 deflationary 97.5% mint ratio).
